titleStmt.title: SII 26.528: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 528. (A.R. No. 500 of 1909.) ŚŌḺAPURAM, SIVAGANGA TALUK, RAMANATHAPURAM DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription is built in at the end and therefore several details are not clear.

It records the gift of land made by the king to the image of the god Sundarapāṇḍyaviṇṇagar-āḻvār set up by a certain Nāchchiyār (name lost) in the temple of the god Uttamaśōḻaviṇṇagar Āḻvār of Uttamaśōḻach-chaturvvēdimaṅgalam in Āṇmā-nāḍu. The gift was intended to provide for worship and offerings daily.

Such places as Vikramapāṇḍyappērēri in Āri-nāḍu a dēvādāna of Uḍaiyanāyaka Viṇṇagarāḻvār, Maṇalūr in Koṭṭu-nāḍu, and Śri-Parāntakach-chaturvēdimaṅgalam are mentioned as forming the boundaries of the gift-land. Other places like Paṉaiyūr and Karuvaṉūr also are mentioned.
The signatory was Periya [. .] perumāḷ alias Veṇāvuḍaiyār Tirumana ••••] of Pirambalūr.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ koṉerimelkoṇṭāṉ Āṇmānāṭṭu Uttamacoḻaccaturvvedimaṅkalattu Uttamacoḻaviṇṇakar Āḻ
Ikkoyil nācciyā Eḻuntaruḷivitta cuntarapāṇṭiya viṇṇakarāḻvāṟku veṇṭum nitta nima
Uṭaiyanāyakaviṇṇakarāḻvār tevatāṉam vikramapāṇṭiyap pereri melellaiyil nāṭṭiṉa
nāṭṭiṉa Ellaik kallukku meṟkum teṉṉellai koṭṭunāṭṭu maṇalūrp pā ceḻiyato
nallūr vaṭavellaiyil nāṭṭiṉa tiruvāḻikkallukku vaṭakkum melellai śrī parāntakaccaturvve
lūr kiḻellaiyil nāṭṭiṉa tiruccūlak kallukku kiḻakkum vaṭavellai karuvaṉūrt tirukkaḷāntiśvaramu�
koti teṉṉellaiyil nāṭṭiṉa tiruccūlakkallukku teṟkum Āka nāṉkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa ni
ṅ kuḷapparippum Uṭppaṭṭa nilattil paḻantevatāṉam paḷḷiccantam nikki nikki Uḷḷa nilamum pa
pāl Āṟṟukku vaṭakaraiyil vilaikoṇṭu nāṉkellaiyilum kallu nāṭṭiṉa nattamum Uṭppaṭṭa nilam
riyavārācciyum veṭṭipāṭṭamum pañcupili cantuvikkirakapperum vācalpeṟum Ilāñcaṉaippeṟum
ṭamum Iṭaiyar variyum Iṉavariyum poṉvariyum maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭaṉavum Uṭa(p)paṭap pattāvatu mutal ce
m Iṭattum patiṉeṭṭaṭiyāṉa virapāṇṭiyaṉ kolāl nilamaḷantu payirpārttu viḷainta nilattu nikki nilā
ṉa Accum kāriya Ārācciyum veṭṭipāṭṭamum pañcupili cantuvikkirakappeṟum vācalpeṟum Ilāñcaṉai
paṭṭaṉavum Uṭpaṭṭa māttāl kācu kālum mutal virapāṇṭiyaṉāl nellu nākkalamum kuṟuvai vi
mukkālum tulā Iṟaittu viḷainta nilattukku Oṉṟu kālum Eḷḷum vākum tiṉaiyum pullum Iṟuṅku
tākavum Iṭappeṟa veṇumeṉṟu namakkuc co
rvetimaṅkalattu Uttamacoḻaviṇṇakarāḻvār koyil nācciyārppa ṇṭar reḻuntaruḷuvitta cuntara
māṟṟu Uḷḷuṭṭu veṇṭum nitta nivantaṅkaḷukku Ārināṭṭu vayali kiḻel yanāyaka viṇṇakarā
neri melellaiyil nāṭṭiṉa tiruvāḻik kallukkum Ippaṉaiyūr kuḷattu nāṭṭiṉa Ellaik kalluk
maṇalūrp pālcceḻiyaṉeriyil tiruvuṭaiviṇṇakarāḻvār te liruñcolai
tiruvāḻikkallukku vaṭakkum melellai śrīparāntakaccaturvedimaṅkalattu śrī ṉ Īśvaramuṭai
kkallukku kiḻakku vaṭavellai karuvaṉūrttirukkaḷāntiśvara
llukku teṟkum Āka nāṉ
svastiśrī Ittaṉma
m pirampalūruṭai
yāṉ periya
perumāḷāṉa ve
ṇāvuṭaiyār tiruma
ṇa ḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 26.528 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
